catalog_content:
Item Name: Tru-Nut Peanut Protein Powder - 20g of Protein, 140 Calories, Ideal for Smoothies and Protein Shakes, Versatile and Easy to Use, No Sugar Added, Low Carb, Gluten Free, 24oz
Bullet Point 1: Plant protein power: Tru-Nut Peanut Protein Powder is the best-tasting plant protein available. And we do it without adding any sugar or flavorings. The secret is our roasted peanut powder that provides an amazing peanut butter flavor and 20g of protein per 36g serving.
Bullet Point 2: Healthy option: Our vegan protein powder contains only 2 simple ingredients: roasted peanuts and pea protein. With a low net carb rating of just 6g per 36g serving, you're getting the best tasting, healthiest protein powder available.
Bullet Point 3: Versatile and easy to use: Simply add Tru-Nut to your favorite protein shake or smoothie. This can replace your traditional protein powder or be used together for an extra protein boost.
Bullet Point 4: Cooking and baking: There's more you can do with Tru-Nut. Add to your waffle or pancake mix to add healthy plant protein to your breakfast. Or sprinkle some in your oatmeal or overnight oats to add an amazing peanut butter flavor.
Bullet Point 5: Made in the USA: We use high oleic peanuts that are exclusively grown in the Southeastern United States. Our factory is 3rd party audited with an SQF certification and all of our products pass through a metal detection device to ensure optimal quality.
Value: 24.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Plant-based protein powder positioned as a healthy, versatile option with high protein content and low net carbs. Marketed as a natural, sugar-free alternative with simple ingredients and vegan-friendly credentials. Mid-tier pricing likely driven by functional benefits, clean label, and manufacturing quality (SQF certified, made in USA).

catalog_content:
Item Name: Keli's Pineapple Hawaiian Luau Teriyaki, Gourmet Pineapple Teriyaki Marinade and Huli Huli Basting Sauce. Healthy Teriyaki Sauce Low Sodium & Gluten Free - Made With Gluten Free Soy Sauce (85oz) Product Description:

Keli’s Hawaiian Pineapple Luau Teriyaki Sauce Marinade is perfect for chicken, beef, steak, pork, and more. Its delicious thin consistency is just right, bringing an instant unforgettable aroma to any dish it is added to. Similar to soy sauce, this thin marinade tastes delicious on rice, stir-fry, noodles, or even as a dipping sauce for pot stickers.

  • Tastes Amazing
  • 100% Gluten Free
  • Low Sodium
  • No Preservatives
  • Easy to use
  • Perfect Marinade

Salad Dressing of Choice

Our sweet sauce leaves nothing to be desired even for the salad lovers as it is as flavorful on a salad as it is on the meat of your choice. This could be your healthy low sodium Salad dressing alternative if you are allergic to gluten or have celiac disease.

Family Fun with Keli’s

This soy glaze teriyaki sauce is great for barbecuing! Grab your aprons and gather around the grill with family and friend during the summer and springtime. Add a kick of flavor to your BBQ party by simply brush our sauce on while turning your favorite meat or veggies on the grill. Keli’s Hawaiian Luau is gluten-free, low in sodium, and contains no MSG or preservatives. What's there not to love? Get the best of both worlds! It's the perfect blend of healthy and delicious.

Sauce of All Seasons

Not only is our sauce an add on to the dishes you make in the Summer and Spring seasons but also for your Christmas and Autumn too. Make us a part of your Christmas by trying our Pineapple Teriyaki Glazed Ham Recipe or a part of your autumn by trying our Hawaiian Luau Crock-Pot Chicken Recipe. Keli’s love to create in the kitchen, so we know how time-consuming it is to make the perfect sauce. Our sauces have made that easier for the workaholic businessmen and businesswomen who are constantly on the go. Using our sauce as an ingredient to your own concoction will help you to achieve the desired taste in a shorter time.

Value: 170.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Gluten-free and low-sodium teriyaki marinade positioned as a healthy, versatile cooking sauce. Large 85 oz bottle suggests bulk value for home cooks and grilling enthusiasts. Branding emphasizes natural flavors and ease of use, but lacks premium or organic certifications. Competitively priced for a gourmet-style marinade with broad culinary applications.

Bullet Point 2: #1 Consumers Choice Triple Sec Cocktail Syrup
Bullet Point 3: Delicious orange zest flavor and natural sugar sweetness. No harsh or bitter aftertaste.
Bullet Point 4: Versatile Triple Sec perfect for margarita, cosmopolitan, sidecar, long island, martini, mimosa, and more.

Product Description: Elevate your mixology game with our small-batched Triple Sec Syrup, a premium infusion of rich, authentic orange flavor. Crafted exclusively from 100% sugar, it's a game-changer for cocktail enthusiasts who demand quality without compromise. Unlike the artificial alternatives, our syrup contains no artificial sweeteners, flavors, or colors, and steers clear of stevia or monk fruit, ensuring no bitter or weird aftertaste. Our secret to delivering that big, bold orange zest flavor? Real orange extract, carefully incorporated into every bottle. Unleash your creativity with confidence, knowing that every cocktail you craft with our Triple Sec Syrup will be a masterpiece of uncompromising taste and pure, unadulterated citrus delight. Raise the bar and redefine your mixology experience with the authenticity of perfection.
Value: 33.8
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium cocktail syrup positioned as a high-quality, artisanal product for mixology enthusiasts.
